description: Style Note woodland, a giant in the outdoor shoe industry, have come up with this rugged loafer with a refined stance. Stylish top-stitching on the woodsy upper adds an aesthetic referenced from the outdoors. Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with a rugged belt. Product Details Khaki coloured slip on shoes, upper with aggressive stitch detailing and embossed branding on the lateral side of the heel, stitches on the seams of the toe box, padded insole for in-step comfort, removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic, rubber midsole, dual density TPU outsole with grooves for grip and traction, outsole reinforced onto the heel for maximum comfort Material and Care Nubuk, TPU Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not store in direct sunlight
